requirement_topic.en: Cybersecurity and Data Localization — FSTEC Certification and Federal Law 149-FZ (Connected Devices and IoT Services)
requirement_topic.zh: 网络安全与数据本地化——FSTEC认证及第149-FZ号联邦法律（联网设备及物联网服务）
requirement_topic.zht: 網路安全與數據本地化——FSTEC認證及第149-FZ號聯邦法律（聯網設備及物聯網服務）

summary.en: Russia's cybersecurity and data localization requirements for wireless IoT devices and their associated cloud services operate on two distinct tracks. Track 1 — FSTEC (Federal Service for Technical and Export Control, FSTEC Russia) certification: FSTEC is the primary technical regulator for information security in Russia. FSTEC certification of software and hardware products is mandatory for devices and systems used in critical information infrastructure (CII), government networks, and regulated sectors (energy, finance, health, defence, transport). Consumer-market IoT devices not operating in CII contexts are not currently subject to mandatory FSTEC certification, though this regulatory boundary is narrowing as Russia expands its CII definition. Exporters of wireless devices targeting enterprise, industrial, or government procurement channels in Russia should treat FSTEC certification as a de facto requirement. Track 2 — Data localization under Federal Law 149-FZ (On Information, Information Technologies and the Protection of Information) and Federal Law 152-FZ (On Personal Data): Any connected IoT device or associated cloud service that collects, stores, or processes personal data of Russian citizens must store that data on servers physically located in Russia, and the operator must be registered with Roskomnadzor's data register. Non-compliance with 152-FZ data localization can result in service blocking by Roskomnadzor. No mandatory consumer IoT security certification framework (equivalent to the EU Cyber Resilience Act or US Cyber Trust Mark) is in force in Russia as of the content date, but GOST R standards on information security for IoT are under development.
summary.zh: 俄罗斯针对无线物联网设备及相关云服务的网络安全和数据本地化要求在两个不同轨道上运行。轨道一——FSTEC（联邦技术和出口控制局，FSTEC Russia）认证：FSTEC是俄罗斯信息安全的主要技术监管机构。FSTEC对软硬件产品的认证对于用于关键信息基础设施（CII）、政府网络及受监管行业（能源、金融、医疗、国防、交通）的设备和系统为强制要求。不在CII场景下运营的消费市场物联网设备目前不受强制FSTEC认证约束，但随着俄罗斯扩大CII定义，这一监管边界正在收窄。面向俄罗斯企业、工业或政府采购渠道的无线设备出口商应将FSTEC认证视为实际强制要求。轨道二——第149-FZ号联邦法律（关于信息、信息技术及信息保护）和第152-FZ号联邦法律（关于个人数据）下的数据本地化：任何收集、存储或处理俄罗斯公民个人数据的联网物联网设备或相关云服务，须将该数据存储于物理位于俄罗斯的服务器上，运营商须在Roskomnadzor数据登记册中进行登记。不遵守第152-FZ号法律的数据本地化规定可能导致Roskomnadzor封锁服务。截至内容日期，俄罗斯尚无强制消费物联网安全认证框架（相当于欧盟《网络弹性法》或美国Cyber Trust Mark），但针对物联网的GOST R信息安全标准正在制定中。
summary.zht: 俄羅斯針對無線物聯網設備及相關雲服務的網路安全和數據本地化要求在兩個不同軌道上運行。軌道一——FSTEC（聯邦技術和出口控制局，FSTEC Russia）認證：FSTEC是俄羅斯信息安全的主要技術監管機構。FSTEC對軟硬件產品的認證對於用於關鍵信息基礎設施（CII）、政府網絡及受監管行業（能源、金融、醫療、國防、交通）的設備和系統為強制要求。不在CII場景下運營的消費市場物聯網設備目前不受強制FSTEC認證約束，但隨著俄羅斯擴大CII定義，這一監管邊界正在收窄。面向俄羅斯企業、工業或政府採購渠道的無線設備出口商應將FSTEC認證視為實際強制要求。軌道二——第149-FZ號聯邦法律（關於信息、信息技術及信息保護）和第152-FZ號聯邦法律（關於個人數據）下的數據本地化：任何收集、存儲或處理俄羅斯公民個人數據的聯網物聯網設備或相關雲服務，須將該數據存儲於物理位於俄羅斯的服務器上，運營商須在Roskomnadzor數據登記冊中進行登記。不遵守第152-FZ號法律的數據本地化規定可能導致Roskomnadzor封鎖服務。截至內容日期，俄羅斯尚無強制消費物聯網安全認證框架（相當於歐盟《網路韌性法》或美國Cyber Trust Mark），但針對物聯網的GOST R信息安全標準正在制定中。

standards_or_laws: Federal Law No. 149-FZ of 27.07.2006 — On Information, Information Technologies and the Protection of Information (data localization and information security obligations)
Federal Law No. 152-FZ of 27.07.2006 — On Personal Data (personal data localization requirement for Russian citizen data, Article 18(5))
Federal Law No. 187-FZ of 26.07.2017 — On the Security of Critical Information Infrastructure of the Russian Federation (CII designation and FSTEC certification obligations)
FSTEC Russia — Order No. 239 of 25.12.2017 — Security requirements for significant CII objects (mandates product certification for CII-connected devices)

summary.en: China's cybersecurity and data protection framework for IoT and connected devices includes: the Cybersecurity Law (CSL, 2017) imposing network security obligations; the Personal Information Protection Law (PIPL, 2021) governing personal data collection and cross-border transfer; the Data Security Law (DSL, 2021) on data classification and security; MIIT regulations on IoT terminal security (draft standards under development); and MLPS 2.0 (Multi-Level Protection Scheme, GB/T 22239-2019) — the graded security certification framework for information systems including IoT platforms. Products destined for Chinese CII or government procurement may require MLPS Level 2 or Level 3 certification. Cross-border data transfer from China requires a security assessment by the Cyberspace Administration of China (CAC) for large-scale transfers. These requirements apply under Chinese law and have no equivalence with FSTEC certification or the Russian 149-FZ/152-FZ data localization framework.
summary.zh: 中国针对物联网和联网设备的网络安全及数据保护框架包括：《网络安全法》（CSL，2017年，规定网络安全义务）；《个人信息保护法》（PIPL，2021年，规范个人数据收集和跨境传输）；《数据安全法》（DSL，2021年，涉及数据分类和安全）；MIIT物联网终端安全法规（标准草案制定中）；以及MLPS 2.0（网络安全等级保护，GB/T 22239-2019）——适用于包括物联网平台在内的信息系统的分级安全认证框架。面向中国CII或政府采购的产品可能须通过MLPS二级或三级认证。从中国大规模跨境数据传输须通过网络安全审查办公室（CAC）的安全评估。上述要求依据中国法律适用，与FSTEC认证或俄罗斯第149-FZ/152-FZ数据本地化框架之间不存在等同关系。
summary.zht: 中國針對物聯網和聯網設備的網路安全及數據保護框架包括：《網絡安全法》（CSL，2017年，規定網絡安全義務）；《個人信息保護法》（PIPL，2021年，規範個人數據收集和跨境傳輸）；《數據安全法》（DSL，2021年，涉及數據分類和安全）；MIIT物聯網終端安全法規（標準草案制定中）；以及MLPS 2.0（網絡安全等級保護，GB/T 22239-2019）——適用於包括物聯網平台在內的信息系統的分級安全認證框架。面向中國CII或政府採購的產品可能須通過MLPS二級或三級認證。從中國大規模跨境數據傳輸須通過網絡安全審查辦公室（CAC）的安全評估。上述要求依據中國法律適用，與FSTEC認證或俄羅斯第149-FZ/152-FZ數據本地化框架之間不存在等同關係。

standards_or_laws: Cybersecurity Law of the People's Republic of China (CSL) — effective 01.06.2017 (network operator obligations, security standards)
Personal Information Protection Law (PIPL) — effective 01.11.2021 (personal data processing, cross-border transfer rules)
Data Security Law (DSL) — effective 01.09.2021 (data classification, important data protection)
GB/T 22239-2019 — Baseline for Classified Protection of Cybersecurity (MLPS 2.0, graded security scheme for information systems including IoT)

gap.en: The China and Russia cybersecurity frameworks are parallel but non-equivalent: Chinese MLPS certification, CSL compliance, and PIPL registration have no legal weight in Russia. The two principal gaps are: (1) FSTEC product certification gap — devices sold into Russian regulated-sector or government channels must undergo FSTEC certification under Russian GOST R information security standards; Chinese security certifications do not substitute. Consumer-channel IoT devices are currently exempt from mandatory FSTEC certification but this boundary is evolving. (2) Data localization gap — IoT devices or services processing Russian personal data must store that data in Russia (Federal Law 152-FZ, Article 18(5)); Chinese cloud infrastructure (Alibaba Cloud, Huawei Cloud, Tencent Cloud) is not located in Russia; a Russian data centre or authorised local cloud operator must be used. Services that fail to localize data risk Roskomnadzor blocking, as demonstrated by the blocking of LinkedIn in 2016 for 152-FZ non-compliance.
gap.zh: 中俄网络安全框架并行但不等同：中国MLPS认证、CSL合规及PIPL登记在俄罗斯不具法律效力。两大主要差距为：(1) FSTEC产品认证差距——向俄罗斯受监管行业或政府渠道销售的设备须依据俄罗斯GOST R信息安全标准接受FSTEC认证；中国安全认证不可替代。消费渠道物联网设备目前免于强制FSTEC认证，但该边界正在演变。(2) 数据本地化差距——处理俄罗斯个人数据的物联网设备或服务须将该数据存储于俄罗斯境内（第152-FZ号联邦法律第18条第5款）；中国云基础设施（阿里云、华为云、腾讯云）不在俄罗斯境内；须使用俄罗斯数据中心或授权的当地云运营商。未能实现数据本地化的服务面临Roskomnadzor封锁风险，2016年LinkedIn因不遵守第152-FZ号法律而被封锁即为例证。
gap.zht: 中俄網路安全框架並行但不等同：中國MLPS認證、CSL合規及PIPL登記在俄羅斯不具法律效力。兩大主要差距為：(1) FSTEC產品認證差距——向俄羅斯受監管行業或政府渠道銷售的設備須依據俄羅斯GOST R信息安全標準接受FSTEC認證；中國安全認證不可替代。消費渠道物聯網設備目前免於強制FSTEC認證，但該邊界正在演變。(2) 數據本地化差距——處理俄羅斯個人數據的物聯網設備或服務須將該數據存儲於俄羅斯境內（第152-FZ號聯邦法律第18條第5款）；中國雲基礎設施（阿里雲、華為雲、騰訊雲）不在俄羅斯境內；須使用俄羅斯數據中心或授權的當地雲運營商。未能實現數據本地化的服務面臨Roskomnadzor封鎖風險，2016年LinkedIn因不遵守第152-FZ號法律而被封鎖即為例證。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for regulated-sector/CII applications — FSTEC certification required for devices in critical information infrastructure, government, or regulated-sector deployments; data localization under Federal Law 152-FZ mandatory for any connected service processing Russian personal data; consumer IoT channel currently exempt from mandatory FSTEC certification
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for regulated-sector and large-scale deployments — MLPS certification required for information systems in regulated sectors; PIPL/152-FZ-equivalent data localization applies under Chinese law for cross-border personal data transfers; CSL network security obligations apply to all network operators in China

source.publisher: FSTEC Russia — Federal Service for Technical and Export Control

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Wireless IoT devices targeting Russian enterprise, industrial, or government procurement channels must obtain FSTEC product certification under Russian information security standards — Chinese MLPS, CSL, or PIPL compliance does not substitute. Consumer-channel IoT devices are currently not subject to mandatory FSTEC certification, but this exemption boundary is evolving as Russia expands its critical information infrastructure definition. Any IoT device or associated cloud service that collects or processes personal data of Russian citizens must comply with Federal Law 152-FZ data localization requirements (data stored on Russia-located servers, operator registered with Roskomnadzor). Non-compliance risks service blocking. Verify current FSTEC certification scope and 152-FZ enforcement practice with qualified Russian legal and regulatory advisers before market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向俄罗斯企业、工业或政府采购渠道的无线物联网设备须依据俄罗斯信息安全标准获得FSTEC产品认证——中国MLPS、CSL或PIPL合规不可替代。消费渠道物联网设备目前不受强制FSTEC认证约束，但随着俄罗斯扩大关键信息基础设施定义，这一豁免边界正在演变。任何收集或处理俄罗斯公民个人数据的物联网设备或相关云服务须遵守第152-FZ号联邦法律数据本地化要求（数据存储于俄罗斯境内服务器，运营商在Roskomnadzor登记）。不合规将面临服务封锁风险。进入市场前请向合格的俄罗斯法律和监管顾问核实现行FSTEC认证范围及第152-FZ执法实践。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向俄羅斯企業、工業或政府採購渠道的無線物聯網設備須依據俄羅斯信息安全標準獲得FSTEC產品認證——中國MLPS、CSL或PIPL合規不可替代。消費渠道物聯網設備目前不受強制FSTEC認證約束，但隨著俄羅斯擴大關鍵信息基礎設施定義，這一豁免邊界正在演變。任何收集或處理俄羅斯公民個人數據的物聯網設備或相關雲服務須遵守第152-FZ號聯邦法律數據本地化要求（數據存儲於俄羅斯境內服務器，運營商在Roskomnadzor登記）。不合規將面臨服務封鎖風險。進入市場前請向合格的俄羅斯法律和監管顧問核實現行FSTEC認證範圍及第152-FZ執法實踐。
